code: export const THEMES=[{id:"aurora",label:"Aurora Drift"},{id:"grove",label:"Neon Grove"},{id:"dark",label:"Dark Matter"},{id:"solar",label:"Solar Flare"},{id:"rose",label:"Rose Quartz"},{id:"cobalt",label:"Cobalt Wave"},{id:"desert",label:"Desert Bloom"},{id:"glacier",label:"Glacier Mint"},{id:"mocha",label:"Mocha Cream"},{id:"mono",label:"Mono Mist"}];export const DEFAULT_THEME=THEMES[0].id;export const isValidTheme=value=>THEMES.some(theme=>theme.id===value);
